input: graph (e.g., citation network, user-item interaction graph)
output: predicted link existence probability for each edge
backbone: any GNN (GCN, GraphSage, NGCF, LightGCN, SEAL) with personalized subgraph selector (PS2)
loss: binary cross-entropy (link prediction loss) + bi-level optimization for subgraph selection
key_idea: automatically and inductively select personalized subgraphs for each edge via bi-level optimization to improve link prediction
